paragraphs.text: And thence I went ⌈⌈towards the east⌉⌉, into the midst ⌈⌈of the mountain range⌉⌉ of the desert, and I saw a wilderness and it was solitary, full of trees and plants. 2. ⌈⌈And⌉⌉ water gushed forth from above. 3. Rushing like a copious watercourse [which flowed] towards the north-west it caused clouds and dew to ascend on every side.
